title: British Airways Owner Sees Profit Hit as War Drives Up Fuel Bill
title_cn: 由于战争推高燃油费用，英国航空公司所有者利润受到打击

title: Stellantis to Deepen China Pact with Joint EV, Spain Plant Shift

title: Oil Market Completely Broken
title_cn: 石油市场完全崩溃
summary:
Oil climbed after renewed clashes between US and Iranian forces which has jeopardized the outlook for a deal to end the war. The Strait of Hormuz has been effectively closed since the start of the war triggering an energy supply shock. Vandana Hari, Founder of VANDA Insights told Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche, oil markets are not reflecting reality.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Record Stock Rally Slips on Iran Clash, Oil Gains: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗冲突导致创纪录的股市上涨，石油收益：市场结束
summary: Stocks pulled back on the final trading day of the week and crude oil rose as escalating Middle East tensions revived concerns over energy supplies, testing the durability of a record-breaking rally.

title: BlackRock Says Emerging Market Bonds Are Headed for Strong Year
title_cn: 贝莱德表示新兴市场债券今年将表现强劲
summary: BlackRock Inc.’s chief of emerging markets debt is counting on another strong year for bond returns as the weaker dollar improves financing conditions.

summary: When Tony Cowell retired in 2023 from a three-decade career advising private equity and hedge funds from the Cayman Islands at KPMG LLP, AI was still relatively nascent.

title: Why Iran War Risks Hit Indian Stocks Harder
title_cn: 为什么伊朗战争风险对印度股市的打击更大
summary: Record foreign outflows and surging energy costs are battering India’s economy and the rupee. While geopolitical tensions drive crude prices higher, some sectors show resilience amid the volatility. Lakshmi Iyer of Bajaj Finserv joined Haslinda Amin on Insight to discuss why market corrections offer opportunities and where she sees value in alternatives. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Clash Near Hormuz as Response on Proposed Deal Awaited
title_cn: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹附近发生冲突，等待对拟议协议的回应
summary: The US and Iran clashed near the Strait of Hormuz, an escalation that threatens to further fracture a fragile ceasefire as the two sides discuss a permanent end to the war.

title: Goldman-Backed ‘Go’ Seeks $1.3 Billion Valuation in Tokyo IPO
title_cn: 高盛支持的“Go”在东京 IPO 寻求 13 亿美元估值
summary: Taxi-hailing app operator Go Inc. is targeting a valuation of about ¥200 billion ($1.3 billion) for its initial public offering that may raise as much as ¥90 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Pounds Edges Higher as Labour Suffers Early Losses
title_cn: 由于劳动力遭受早期损失，英镑小幅走高

title_cn: 美国和伊朗军队发生新冲突后油价上涨
summary: Oil climbed as renewed clashes between US and Iranian forces clouded the outlook for a deal to end the 10-week war.

title: Trump Warns Iran: Sign New Deal Fast or Face More Fire
title_cn: 特朗普警告伊朗：尽快签署新协议否则将面临更多炮火
summary: Trump warns of massive strikes if Iran rejects a US deal, even as he claims a shaky ceasefire holds. While equity markets remain bullish, oil markets show "deep distress" and prediction markets signal low confidence in a swift diplomatic resolution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why China's Rare Earths Grip Is Hard to Break
title_cn: 为什么中国的稀土控制难以打破
summary: China's near-total control of the rare earths industry has become one of its most potent geopolitical levers. Chris Kennedy, who leads economic statecraft analysis at Bloomberg Economics, says President Donald Trump is expected to prioritize retaining US access to these industrial inputs, which are vital to the auto, defense and tech sectors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Myanmar Says Giant 11,000-Carat Ruby Found in Mandalay Region
title_cn: 缅甸称曼德勒地区发现巨型 11,000 克拉红宝石
summary: Myanmar has announced the discovery of a massive ruby weighing 11,000 carats (2.2 kilograms), a rare find even for the country’s central gemstone hub of Mogok near Mandalay.

title: Ecuador Seeks Bank Response to Laundering Allegations
title_cn: 厄瓜多尔寻求银行对洗钱指控作出回应
summary: Financial regulators in Ecuador said they sought information related to allegations of money laundering at Banco Guayaquil, the nation’s third-biggest bank by net profit.

title: Pakistan Shuns Spot LNG as It Bets on Potential Hormuz Easing
title_cn: 巴基斯坦避开现货液化天然气，因为押注于潜在的霍尔木兹海峡宽松政策
summary: Pakistan opted not to buy urgent cargoes of liquefied natural gas on the spot market, betting that hostilities which have closed the Strait of Hormuz will ease and cheaper supplies from Qatar will arrive soon.

title: Macquarie CFO Says Private Credit Angst Due to Liquidity Issues
title_cn: 麦格理首席财务官表示，流动性问题导致私人信贷焦虑
summary: Worries in the private credit market stem from retail-driven liquidity problems rather than the health of the underlining portfolio, according to Frank Kwok, Chief Financial Officer at Macquarie Group Ltd.

title: New Zealand Government Repeats Call for Kiwibank to Explore Share Sale
title_cn: 新西兰政府再次呼吁 Kiwibank 探索股份出售
summary: New Zealand’s government is reiterating it wants state-owned Kiwibank to become a stronger competitor and that it should be open to raising capital to fund growth, including via a partial share sale.

title: High-Frequency Trader IMC Is Spending Big to Build Team in India
title_cn: 高频交易员 IMC 斥巨资在印度组建团队
summary: It was an unusual Sunday for 30-year-old Jake Yi, who stood with his team in the middle of a Mumbai trading floor as the screens flashed red.

title: ChinaAMC to Accelerate Tokenization Growth
title_cn: 华夏基金加速通证化发展
summary: ChinaAMC CEO Yimei Li says technology upgrades and semiconductors are driving market momentum in China, supporting strong performance in the firm’s ETF products. She also outlines plans for tokenization growth in an exclusive interview on Bloomberg’s ETF IQ Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Oil May Hit $90 in Truce or $150 in Escalation
title_cn: 为什么停战时油价可能会触及 90 美元，升级时油价可能会触及 150 美元
summary: There are three scenarios for oil prices based on how long the Iran war lasts, according to Jacky Tang, emerging markets chief investment officer at Deutsche Bank's private banking arm. (Updates clip from around 2:10 to include the third base case scenario.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Foreign Reserves Fall Further to Two-Year Low in April
title_cn: 印尼四月份外汇储备进一步跌至两年低点
summary: Indonesia’s foreign-exchange reserves fell further in April to the lowest in nearly two years as the central bank stepped up intervention to defend the rupiah.

title: Markets Debate If Japan Sold Treasuries When Intervening in Yen
title_cn: 市场争论日本是否在干预日元时出售国债
summary: The Federal Reserve’s custody holdings of Treasuries fell for the first time in a month at a time Japan was likely intervening to support its currency, with markets debating whether the nation offloaded US securities to fund its yen purchases.

title: Gold Rises as Buying Interest Counters Concern Over Hormuz Clash

summary: Gold rose as signs of buying interest emerged in the wake of strong purchases by China’s central bank, even as fresh clashes in the Middle East threatened to fracture a fragile ceasefire.

title: Macquarie Profit Jumps, Commodities Chief Paid $25.5 Million
title_cn: 麦格理利润猛增，大宗商品业务主管支付 2550 万美元
summary: Macquarie Group Ltd.’s commodities and global markets division chief Simon Wright got a 56% pay bump after profit within the bank’s key business drove earnings growth.

title: Australia’s Battery Boom Starts to Crowd Lucrative Power Trade
title_cn: 澳大利亚的电池热潮开始涌入利润丰厚的电力贸易
summary: Australia’s big-battery build-out is starting to crowd the lucrative trade that made the assets attractive: buying up power when prices are low and selling it back when they spike, capturing the difference.

title: Tencent, Alibaba Face Slowing Growth as AI Costs Mount
title_cn: 随着人工智能成本上升，腾讯、阿里巴巴面临增长放缓
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. earnings will be shaped by rising artificial intelligence investment costs and growing competition in China’s AI sector, following DeepSeek’s high-profile V4 model launch.

title: Gundlach Takes Longshot Bet in Case of US Debt Restructuring
title_cn: 冈拉克在美国债务重组中押注风险不大
summary: DoubleLine Capital’s Jeffrey Gundlach is repositioning some of his funds for the extreme scenario that the US government could choose to restructure its debt in response to a potential future recession.

title: Earnings Resilience Amid Iran Risk: Markets Snapshot
title_cn: 伊朗风险中的盈利弹性：市场快照
summary: The shape-shifting artificial intelligence trade and the ongoing conflict in the Middle East dominated conversations in a week that saw strong earnings results. The Opening Trade spoke with leading market voices and company executives to get their take. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TSMC Sales Grow 17.5% on Extended AI Buildout Boom
title_cn: AI 扩建热潮推动台积电销售额增长 17.5%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a 17.5% increase in its sales, highlighting sustained spending by hyperscalers bankrolling the AI boom.

title: Baidu’s AI Chip Unit Plans Dual IPO in Shanghai and Hong Kong
title_cn: 百度AI芯片部门计划在上海和香港双重IPO
summary: Baidu Inc.’s chip unit Kunlunxin is planning an initial public offering on Shanghai’s Nasdaq-style bourse in addition to a separate listing plan in Hong Kong as the Chinese search engine giant looks to taps investor appetite for semiconductor stocks.

title: Colleges Around the World See Web Outages After Vendor Hack
title_cn: 供应商黑客攻击后，世界各地的大学出现网络中断
summary: Colleges from the US to Australia reported disruptions to a popular online portal used by students at thousands of institutions to take tests and receive grades, days after a cyberattack against its operator.

title: US Rare Earths Champion Views Iran War as Demand ‘Accelerant’

summary: The conflict in the Middle East has highlighted how future wars will be underpinned by rare-earth magnets that are vital in drones and robots, according to MP Materials Corp., the Pentagon-backed producer.

title: Citi Targets Hedge Funds, Private Equity in FX Growth Push
title_cn: 花旗瞄准对冲基金和私募股权推动外汇增长
summary: Citigroup Inc. is expanding its foreign-exchange business with hedge fund and private-equity clients, part of a broader push as global trading volumes rise.

title: South Korea’s Current Account Surplus Surges to Record on Chips
title_cn: 韩国经常账户顺差飙升至创纪录水平
summary: South Korea’s current-account surplus surged to another record in March, driven by a surge in semiconductor exports and stronger shipments across Asia and the US, even as foreign investors sharply reduced holdings of domestic stocks amid rising Middle East tensions.

title: No AI, Poor Returns Drive Indian Investors to Foreign Markets
title_cn: 没有人工智能，回报不佳促使印度投资者转向海外市场
summary: Investors in India, long focused almost entirely on domestic markets, are increasingly starting to look outward.

title: Principal Eyes $3 Billion for Two Data Center Funds on AI Boom
title_cn: 负责人着眼于人工智能热潮为两个数据中心基金提供 30 亿美元
summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. is seeking to raise $3 billion for two funds this year to capitalize on demand for investment in data centers in the US and Europe, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Nvidia CEO Says He Would Join Trump’s China Trip If Invited
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官表示，如果受邀他将参加特朗普的中国之行
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said he would gladly join President Donald Trump on an upcoming visit to China if invited, signaling that the leader of America’s most valuable company has yet to receive an offer to go.

title: CoreWeave Gives Disappointing Forecast After Losses Widen
title_cn: 亏损扩大后 CoreWeave 给出令人失望的预测
summary: AI data center operator CoreWeave Inc. gave a disappointing forecast for the current quarter, sparking concerns about slowing growth at a time when the company is spending heavily to bolster its operations.

title: Google Judge Says Too Early to Pause DOJ Remedy in Search Case
title_cn: 谷歌法官称暂停司法部在搜索案件中的补救措施为时过早
summary: A federal judge rejected Alphabet Inc.’s request to pause an order that forces the tech giant to provide rivals with access to its underlying search data while the company appeals a ruling that it illegally monopolized the online search market.

title: Live from DoubleLine Capital | The Close 5/7/2026
title_cn: 双线资本直播|收盘价 2026 年 5 月 7 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are DoubleLine Global Sovereign & Emerging Markets Head Bill Campbell, GTCR Co-CEO Collin Roche, DoubleLine Non-Agency Residential Mortgage-Backed Securities Head Ken Shinoda, Cambridge Associates’ Samantha Davidson, DoubleLine Deputy CIO Jeffrey Sherman, DoubleLine Global Developed Credit Director Robert Cohen, Man Group CEO Robyn Grew, & DoubleLine CEO & CIO Jeffrey Gundlach. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Rally Hinges on OpenAI Growth Easing Balance Sheet Fear
title_cn: 软银涨势取决于 OpenAI 增长缓解资产负债表担忧
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s stock rally faces a test against reality next week, with investors clamoring for assurance that the company’s multibillion-dollar bet on an increasingly embattled OpenAI will be worth the money.

title: Expedia Revenue Beat Shows Middle East Resilience, Eyes World Cup
title_cn: Expedia 收入增长显示中东地区的韧性，关注世界杯
summary: Expedia Group Inc. posted quarterly revenue that came in slightly ahead of estimates as it overcame Middle East-related travel disruptions and said it expected healthy demand from this summer’s FIFA World Cup.

title: Nvidia to Invest Up to $2.1 Billion in Data Center Firm IREN
title_cn: Nvidia 将向数据中心公司 IREN 投资高达 21 亿美元
summary: Nvidia Corp. is investing as much as $2.1 billion in the data center developer IREN Ltd. as part of a broader partnership between the two companies aimed at accelerating the construction of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Cloudflare Forecast Misses Estimates, Announces Job Cuts
title_cn: Cloudflare 预测未达预期，宣布裁员
summary: Cloudflare Inc. stock fell on Thursday after the company said it would slash jobs and gave a forecast for revenue that fell short of analysts’ expectations.

title: Dorsey’s Block Raises Forecasts After AI-Driven Job Cuts
title_cn: 人工智能驱动的裁员后，多西的区块提高了预测
summary: Block Inc. offered a sunnier outlook for profits and growth on Thursday after orchestrating a severe round of job cuts related to artificial intelligence that executives said were painful but necessary to improve performance.

title: The AI Revival of the Three Mile Island Nuclear Plant
title_cn: 三哩岛核电站的人工智能复兴
summary: Microsoft’s vast power demands are bringing together two transformative—and risky—technologies.

title: Why Private Credit Is Facing Its Biggest Test Yet
title_cn: 为什么私人信贷面临迄今为止最大的考验
summary: The private credit boom may be stalling. Bloomberg Originals shows how AI is exposing hidden risks that are scaring off some investors, pointing to a possible reckoning for the $1.8 trillion market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cloudflare to Cut One-Fifth of Workers in Move to AI-First Model
title_cn: Cloudflare 将裁员五分之一，转向人工智能优先模式
summary: Cloudflare Inc. plans to cut more than 1,100 jobs globally as it accelerates its shift to an agentic AI-first operating model.

title: Airbnb Boosts Annual Sales Outlook While Spending Picks Up
title_cn: Airbnb 在支出增加的同时提高了年度销售前景
summary: Airbnb Inc. boosted its annual forecast on robust bookings in the major markets in the Americas, while it posted a big jump in spending as part of an effort to diversify the business.

title: Equities Are Getting Stretched, DoubleLine's Sherman Warns
title_cn: DoubleLine 的谢尔曼警告称，股市正在紧张
summary: Jeffrey Sherman, DoubleLine's deputy CIO and lead portfolio manager for multi-sector and derivative strategies, discusses the current state of the financial markets. Sherman also comments on the recent wave of big tech earnings and anticipates the potential impact of upcoming Nvidia results. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Datadog Shares Soar by Most in Six Years on Higher Outlook
title_cn: 展望更高，Datadog 股价六年来涨幅最大
summary: The shares of Datadog Inc. surged by the most in more than six years after the software developer raised its full-year outlook for sales and earnings, far exceeding Wall Street’s expectations.

title: MercadoLibre Slips As Profits Miss Despite Revenue Surge
title_cn: 尽管收入激增，MercadoLibre 仍因利润下滑而下滑
summary: Shares in e-commerce and fintech giant MercadoLibre Inc. slipped after profits missed estimates for the fourth quarter in a row even as revenue grew at its fastest pace in nearly four years.

title: Arm Warns of Phone Market Weakness | Bloomberg Tech 5/7/2026
title_cn: Arm 警告手机市场疲软彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 7 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde speaks with Arm CEO Rene Haas about sluggishness in the smartphone industry and growing demand from AI data centers. Plus, Anthropic signs an agreement with Elon Musk's SpaceX to access computing resources from its competitor. And, the CEO of HawkEye 360 discusses the satellite surveillance firm's IPO, which raised $416 million.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GameStop's eBay Bid Is So Befuddling Even Merger Arbs Are Steering Clear
title_cn: GameStop 的 eBay 出价如此令人困惑，甚至连并购套利者都避开了
summary: On paper, GameStop Corp.’s head-turning $56 billion bid for eBay Inc. offers a potential fat profit for investors willing to wager on the unconventional deal. In practice, merger specialists aren’t buying it.

title: La informalidad impulsa el reinado del efectivo en México
title_cn: 墨西哥的非正规性推动了现金的统治
summary: La arraigada cultura del pago en efectivo del país se mantiene firme frente a un esfuerzo implacable de cientos de millones de dólares por parte de las empresas de tecnología financiera

title: Myanmar’s Neighbors Seek to Ease Its Isolation Despite Conflict
title_cn: 尽管发生冲突，缅甸邻国仍寻求缓解孤立状态
summary: Sentiment is warming among some Southeast Asian nations toward easing Myanmar’s isolation five years after the overthrow of Aung San Suu Kyi, with diplomats signaling a desire to bring the crisis-torn nation back into the fold despite ongoing conflict.

title: Farage’s Reform Racks Up Gains in UK Local Election
title_cn: 法拉奇的改革在英国地方选举中获胜
summary: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK racked up sweeping gains in the first counts in local elections, with British voters continuing to turn away from Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s governing Labour Party. The results show a splintering of British politics, with the insurgent Reform and Green parties making gains. Bloomberg’s Alex Morgan reports from London.

title: Pretty Awful Day For Labour: UK Polling Analyst
title_cn: 英国民意调查分析师：对于工党来说这是非常糟糕的一天
summary: Polling analyst and Conservative Party peer Robert Hayward says early indications following UK local elections show the results are "as bad as people were predicting for Labour", but London so far appears to be the one exception.  Early results suggest a "great night for Reform", according to Hayward. But a full picture of the results might not come into focus until late in the UK day. In an interview on Bloomberg Daybreak Europe, Hayward said it will be a "summer of discontent" for Labour as they argue over whether or not to replace Prime Minister Keir Starmer. He added that he "wouldn't be at all surprised" if this happened over the next few months.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thailand, Cambodia Seek to Rebuild Ties After Deadly Clashes
title_cn: 泰国和柬埔寨在致命冲突后寻求重建关系
summary: Thailand and Cambodia pledged this week to repair fractured ties, even as a new rift over a canceled maritime pact threatens to undermine a fragile peace following last year’s deadly border clashes.

title: One Year After Pakistan Clash, Trump Stokes Worries in India
title_cn: 巴基斯坦冲突一年后，特朗普引发印度担忧
summary: In the year since India and Pakistan came close to all-out war, officials in New Delhi have become increasingly worried about Islamabad’s cozy relations with US President Donald Trump.

title: Farage Racks Up UK Election Gains as Voters Punish Starmer
title_cn: 法拉奇在英国选举中获胜，选民惩罚斯塔默
summary: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK racked up sweeping gains in the first counts in local elections, with British voters continuing to turn away from Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s governing Labour Party.

title: US Fires on Targets in Iran, Awaits Response to Proposal
title_cn: 美国向伊朗目标开火，等待对提案的回应
summary: The US struck military targets in Iran after the country fired on three Navy destroyers sailing in the Strait of Hormuz. The latest clash heightens tensions in the region as the US attempts to exit a war now in its third month. President Donald Trump’s administration has been waiting for Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the strait and end the conflict. Bloomberg’s Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports.

title: Saudi Arabia Boosts Logistics Spending to Blunt War Impact
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯增加物流支出以减轻战争影响
summary: Saudi Arabia brought forward some planned spending on infrastructure and food imports to soften the impact of the Iran war and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a move that added to its budget deficit in the first quarter.

title: Anthony Scaramucci on Trump, MAGA and the Midterms
title_cn: 安东尼·斯卡拉穆奇谈特朗普、MAGA 和中期选举
summary: In this conversation with Mishal Husain, former Donald Trump aide Anthony Scaramucci talks about the US midterms, MAGA’s grip on the GOP and what he got wrong about Sam Bankman-Fried. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi’s Sweep in Key State Puts Spotlight on Voter Roll Purge
title_cn: 莫迪在关键州的横扫让选民名册清洗成为焦点
summary: A landslide win by Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s party in a key state election this week has sparked debate over whether controversial changes to voter rolls helped secure the surprise result.

title: Russians Weary of War and Repression Start to Blame the Kremlin
title_cn: 厌倦了战争和镇压的俄罗斯人开始指责克里姆林宫
summary: For years, many Russians cheered on Vladimir Putin’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine in a wave of nationalist fervor. Others kept silent, fearful of the state cracking down against even mild criticism of the social and economic fallout.

title: US Fires on Iranian Targets as Trump Demands Deal From Tehran
title_cn: 特朗普要求德黑兰达成协议，美国向伊朗目标开火
summary: The US struck military targets in Iran after the country fired on three Navy destroyers sailing in the Strait of Hormuz, an escalation that threatened to fracture a fragile ceasefire and reignite hostilities even as the two sides say they’re discussing an end to the war.

title: Lula Emerges From Trump Meeting ‘Optimistic’ on Trade
title_cn: 卢拉在特朗普会议上对贸易持“乐观”态度
summary: US President Donald Trump and his Brazilian counterpart, Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, expressed confidence that the two nations would be able to resolve their trade issues in the coming weeks after a meeting at the White House that both leaders cast as productive.

title: Trump Rejects Need for Curbs on Oil Exports After Trade Surge
title_cn: 特朗普拒绝在贸易激增后限制石油出口
summary: President Donald Trump said there’s no need for curbs on US oil or jet fuel exports to address global shortages sparked by the war with Iran.

title: Trump Is Hopeful Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship ‘Under Control’
title_cn: 特朗普希望游轮上的汉坦病毒疫情“得到控制”
summary: President Donald Trump said he was hopeful that a deadly outbreak of the hantavirus on a cruise ship was under control and indicated that the administration would make a report about the incident.

title: NYC Moves Closer to Enacting Rent Freeze Promised by Mamdani
title_cn: 纽约市距离实施马姆达尼承诺的租金冻结又近了一步
summary: New York City’s Rent Guidelines Board voted to set a 0% to 2% range for rent increases for roughly one million stabilized apartments, putting Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s pledged freeze within reach.

title: Trump’s Latest 10% Tariffs Found Unlawful by US Trade Court
title_cn: 美国贸易法庭认定特朗普最新 10% 关税非法
summary: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed.

title: Trump-Xi Summit Stays on Track Despite China’s Iran Concerns
title_cn: 尽管中国担心伊朗问题，特习会仍保持正轨
summary: President Donald Trump is forging ahead with plans to hold a summit with counterpart Xi Jinping next week in Beijing, despite unease among Chinese officials about holding the high-stakes meeting before the war in Iran is resolved.

title: Reports: US Military Carried Out Strikes in Strait of Hormuz Area | Balance of Power 05/07/2026
title_cn: 报道：美军对霍尔木兹海峡地区实施打击权力平衡 05/07/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Mark Esper, former US Secretary of Defense in the first Trump Administration and current Red Cell Ventures Partner, shares his insight on reports that the US has carried strikes in Iran and if this could lead to a broader resumption of conflict. Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY) voices his frustrations with Tennessee adopting a new map that eliminates the state’s only Democratic congressional seat. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: People Are Angry: Morelle on Tennessee Redistricting
title_cn: 人们很愤怒：莫雷尔谈田纳西州重新划分选区
summary: Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY) voices his frustrations with Tennessee adopting a new map that eliminates the state’s only Democratic congressional seat. He discusses being tasked with redistricting New York state in lieu of recent events and explains how these two processes have stark differences. Rep. Morelle also talks about his support to end lawmakers from participating in prediction markets and his reaction to NY Governor Kathy Hochul announcing a $268B state budget. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Awaits Fate as Polls Close in Crucial UK Elections
title_cn: 英国关键选举投票结束后斯塔默等待命运
summary: Keir Starmer is awaiting the results of one of the most consequential rounds of local elections in recent British history, a vote that could determine his future as prime minister and shape national policy in Europe’s second-largest economy.

title: UK Minister Urged Starmer to Plan Departure Timeline, Times Reports
title_cn: 据《泰晤士报》报道，英国大臣敦促斯塔默计划出发时间表
summary: UK Energy Secretary Ed Miliband privately urged Prime Minister Keir Starmer to consider setting out a timeline for his resignation, amid concerns that losses in the local election will see him forced out of office, The Times newspaper reported.

title: World’s Most Important Relationship Tested by Trump-Xi Meeting
title_cn: 特习会考验世界上最重要的关系
summary: When Donald Trump’s plane touches down in Beijing, he’ll become the first sitting US president to visit China in nearly a decade. His two-day summit with Xi Jinping extends a personal relationship that’s weathered a tariff war, pandemic and historic energy crisis.

title: Trump Gives EU Until July 4 to Ink Deal, Extending Deadline
title_cn: 特朗普允许欧盟在 7 月 4 日之前签署墨水协议，延长最后期限
summary: President Donald Trump said he would give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the US, after previously threatening to hike tariffs on auto imports as soon as this week if it failed to do so.

title: US Awaits Iran Response on Deal, Stocks Decline From Highs | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/07/2026
title_cn: 美国等待伊朗对协议的回应，股市从高位下跌|彭博商业周刊日报 5/07/2026
summary: On today's episode, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speaks Mike McKee, Bloomberg TV and Radio International Economics & Policy Correspondent on his interview with Mary Daly. They also spoke to Jeff Simmons, President and CEO at Elanco Animal Health, Rebecca Homkes, Lecturer at the London Business School and Dr. Pattie Maes, Head of Fluid Interfaces Group at MIT Media Lab. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: For Trump and Xi, Low Expectations for Beijing Summit Next Week
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平对下周北京峰会的期望较低
summary: There are many points of contention, but substantive deals are unlikely

title: Surveillance Firm Hawkeye 360 Up 31% After $416 Million IPO
title_cn: 监控公司鹰眼 360 首次公开募股 4.16 亿美元后股价上涨 31%
summary: Hawkeye 360 Inc. soared 31% after the provider of satellite-based signals intelligence for US government agencies raised $416 million in a US initial public offering priced at the top of a marketed range.

title: Honduras’ New President Reviews China Ties
title_cn: 洪都拉斯新总统回顾中国关系
summary: Newly inaugurated Honduran President Nasry Asfura is reviewing agreements made with China by his predecessor, Xiomara Castro, before deciding on restoring relations with Taiwan. Asfura spoke to Bloomberg's Erik Schatzker on May 6 on the sidelines of the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills. (Source: Bloomberg)
